member.name: T:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources
member.summary: A strongly-typed resource class, for looking up localized strings, etc.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.ResourceManager
member.summary: Returns the cached ResourceManager instance used by this class.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.Culture
member.summary: Overrides the current thread's CurrentUICulture property for all resource lookups using this strongly typed resource class.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.Espanha
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.França
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.Inglaterra
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.Italia
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.

member.name: P:Atividade27_10.My.Resources.Resources.Portugal
member.summary: Looks up a localized resource of type System.Drawing.Bitmap.
